testcase.name: StynxAuditController API error matrix > GET /_audit/log > returns 200 with audit log entries for an authorized audit reader
StynxAuditController API error matrix > GET /_audit/log > returns 401 when the bearer token is missing
StynxAuditController API error matrix > GET /_audit/log > returns 403 when the principal lacks platform:audit:read:*
StynxAuditModule integration > writes one soft-delete row for the live delete and no archive insert row
StynxAuditModule integration > writes one restore row for the live insert and no archive delete row
StynxAuditModule integration > tags archive-side erasure updates as lgpd erasure
StynxAuditModule integration > verifies the audit.events hash chain and detects direct row tampering
StynxAuditModule integration > retains lgpd partitions longer in detach dry-run
